pageHeader.title: Portfolio
pageHeader.description: See how we build future technology solutions that provide a real impact for our partner businesses.

webgisLand.title: WebGIS Land Monitoring
webgisLand.description: Smart spatial mapping, satellite imagery vegetation analysis, and integration of 12,000+ national boundary coordinates for public forestry agency.
webgisLand.challenge: Monitoring vast national forest boundaries and identifying vegetation changes in hard-to-reach locations.
webgisLand.solution: Developed a custom WebGIS application integrated with PostgreSQL/PostGIS spatial database and Leaflet.js map visualization.
results: Real-time forestry boundary mapping
Automated satellite imagery analysis for vegetation detection
Precise integration of 12,000+ spatial coordinates
Data transparency for both agency and public

portalEcommerce.title: Web Portal & E-Commerce
portalEcommerce.description: Development of interactive corporate website, custom CMS, and e-commerce platform integrated with payment gateway to enhance branding and optimize digital transaction conversion 24/7.
portalEcommerce.challenge: Unifying a professional corporate identity with a fast, secure online portal for transactions.
portalEcommerce.solution: Built a responsive website using React / Next.js and Tailwind CSS connected to a Node.js backend and local payment gateway.
results: Seamless multi-functional corporate & transaction platform
Payment gateway integration for automated billing
Optimized assets and code for rapid page loading
Easy-to-use custom CMS for catalog administration

aiCustomerAgent.title: AI Customer Agent & OCR
aiCustomerAgent.description: Automated physical document digitization with 98% accuracy (OCR) and conversational AI agent based on LLM serving customer queries 24/7.
aiCustomerAgent.challenge: High operational overhead from manual physical document entry and massive repeat query volumes overloading customer service.
aiCustomerAgent.solution: Implemented a computer-vision-based OCR pipeline and conversational AI agents powered by LangChain and FastAPI.
results: 98% accuracy in document digitization automation
Responsive customer service query handling 24/7
CSR workload reduced by up to 60%
LLM context-aligned integration based on business parameters

nurasaStore.title: Nurasa Store
nurasaStore.description: Interactive landing page to promote Nurasa products with modern design and high performance.
nurasaStore.challenge: Building an engaging online presence for F&B products to reach more customers.
nurasaStore.solution: Landing page development using React and Vite with smooth and responsive animations.
results: Increased online brand visibility
Fast and easy product information access
Interactive and responsive user experience

yogiBusana.title: Yogi Busana
yogiBusana.description: Portfolio website and product catalog for Yogi Busana clothing store with multi-language support.
yogiBusana.challenge: Showcasing clothing collections with appealing visuals and reaching local as well as international customers.
yogiBusana.solution: Creation of an SEO-optimized website with internationalization (i18n) features.
results: Easily accessible digital product catalog
Multi-language support for international customers
Increased digital brand awareness

mobileAppTracking.title: Logistics Tracking App
mobileAppTracking.description: Modern mobile application for real-time delivery route tracking, fleet management, and automated status updates for customers.
mobileAppTracking.challenge: Difficulty in tracking fleets in real-time and providing accurate estimated times of arrival (ETA) to customers amidst dynamic traffic.
mobileAppTracking.solution: Development of a cross-platform mobile application using Flutter, integrated directly with Google Maps API and Firebase backend system.
results: 100% real-time delivery route visibility
Improved ETA accuracy by up to 95%
Reduced customer complaints regarding delivery status
Lightweight and battery-efficient application performance

smartCityGIS.title: Smart City Infrastructure Map
smartCityGIS.description: An interactive 3D dashboard for mapping smart city infrastructure, utility networks, and real-time traffic flows.
smartCityGIS.challenge: City authorities struggled to monitor widespread public infrastructure and quickly detect utility anomalies.
smartCityGIS.solution: We designed a custom WebGIS built on React and Mapbox that aggregates live IoT sensor data from across the city.
results: 40% faster response times for utility maintenance
Accurate real-time traffic data visualization
Enhanced public transparency for city information

hrisPortal.title: Enterprise HRIS Portal
hrisPortal.description: A centralized human resources management platform that simplifies attendance tracking, payroll, and employee performance evaluation.
hrisPortal.challenge: Slow, fragmented legacy systems led to payroll calculation errors and decreased overall employee satisfaction.
hrisPortal.solution: Built a modern, secure, and highly user-friendly HR web portal with seamless integration into corporate attendance machines.
results: Payroll processing completed 3x faster
100% accuracy in attendance and leave claims
Significantly boosted software usability for employees

aiSalesAnalytics.title: Predictive Sales Analytics
aiSalesAnalytics.description: An AI-powered analytics dashboard system that predicts future sales trends and detects market anomalies.
aiSalesAnalytics.challenge: The retail company lost profits due to overstocked inventory and failed to anticipate seasonal demand spikes.
aiSalesAnalytics.solution: Implemented predictive Machine Learning models that analyze billions of historical transaction records in seconds.
results: Monthly sales prediction accuracy reached 92%
25% reduction in inventory holding (overstock) costs
Increased ROI through automated market anomaly detection

healthFitnessApp.title: Health & Fitness Tracker
healthFitnessApp.description: A health and fitness tracking application that directly connects with smart wearables to monitor vital metrics.
healthFitnessApp.challenge: Health app users often lost motivation and found it difficult to interpret raw health data from their smartwatches.
healthFitnessApp.solution: We built a mobile application that translates vital data into user-friendly charts alongside daily workout recommendations.
results: Monthly active user retention spiked by 45%
Seamless data synchronization with various smartwatches
Stunning and modern dark mode interface
